name: Eminis Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Eminis Ambalaj Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells plastic and metal packaging solutions in Turkey and internationally. Its products are used for paints, glues, lube oils, chemicals, ice creams, yoghurts, cheese, frozen foods, honey, jams, olives, hazelnut cocoa-butter, candies, spices/powder, drinks, hair gel, and cosmetic products. The company serves for paint, chemicals, and food sectors. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in Dilovasi, Turkey.
